name: Apple
description: Apples are crisp, juicy fruits. They come in various colors and flavors, ranging from sweet to tart. Apples are often eaten raw, used in baking, and pressed into cider.

name: Apricot
description: Apricots are small, orange fruits known for their velvety skin and sweet-tart flavor. They are commonly eaten fresh, dried, or used in jams and desserts.

name: Avocado
description: Avocados are creamy, nutrient-dense fruits. Rich in healthy fats and vitamins, they are often used in salads, spreads, and dips like guacamole.

name: Banana
description: Bananas are elongated, sweet fruits. They are a convenient snack, rich in potassium and energy-boosting carbohydrates.

name: Blackberry
description: Blackberries are dark purple to black fruits. They have a sweet-tart flavor and are commonly used in desserts, jams, and smoothies.

name: Blueberry
description: Blueberries are small, round fruits known for their sweet flavor and deep blue color. They are rich in antioxidants and widely used in baking and snacks.

name: Cherry
description: Cherries are small, round fruits with a sweet or tart flavor. They are enjoyed fresh, in pies, or preserved as jams.

name: Dragon fruit
description: Dragon fruit, or pitaya, has a striking appearance with a spiky skin and sweet, mildly tangy flesh speckled with black seeds.

name: Fig
description: Figs are sweet, pear-shaped fruits with a soft texture and many tiny seeds. They are eaten fresh, dried, or used in baking and preserves.

name: Grape
description: Grapes are small, juicy fruits. Available in various colors, they are eaten fresh, dried into raisins, or used to make juice and wine.

name: Grapefruit
description: Grapefruits are large, tart citrus fruits. They are enjoyed for their juicy segments and are commonly eaten fresh or juiced.

name: Kiwi
description: Kiwis are small, fuzzy fruits with bright green or golden flesh and a unique sweet-tart flavor.

name: Lemon
description: Lemons are bright yellow citrus fruits known for their sour taste and high vitamin C content. They are widely used in cooking and beverages.

name: Lime
description: Limes are small, green citrus fruits with a tart flavor. They are essential in many dishes and drinks for their zest and acidity.

name: Mango
description: Mangoes are juicy, tropical fruits. Their sweet, rich flesh is enjoyed fresh, in smoothies, or used in cooking and desserts.

name: Mangosteen
description: Mangosteens are tropical fruits with a thick purple rind and juicy, white inner segments. They have a unique sweet-tart flavor.

name: Melon
description: Melon refers to various fruits including cantaloupe, honeydew, and watermelon. They are known for their sweet, juicy flesh and refreshing taste.

name: Nectarine
description: Nectarines are smooth-skinned relatives of peaches. They have a juicy, sweet flavor and are often eaten fresh or used in desserts.

name: Orange
description: Oranges are citrus fruits valued for their juicy, sweet-tart segments. They are popular in juices, snacks, and desserts.

name: Papaya
description: Papayas are tropical fruits with sweet, orange-red flesh and black seeds. They are often eaten fresh or used in smoothies.

name: Passion fruit
description: Passion fruits are round, tropical fruits with a tough rind and aromatic, tangy pulp. They are used in drinks, desserts, and sauces.

name: Pear
description: Pears are soft, juicy fruits with a sweet flavor and a grainy texture. They are eaten fresh, poached, or used in desserts.

name: Persimmon
description: Persimmons are orange-red fruits with a sweet, honey-like flavor. They can be eaten fresh or dried when fully ripe.

name: Pineapple
description: Pineapples are tropical fruits with spiky skin and sweet-tart yellow flesh. They are widely used in cooking and drinks.

name: Plum
description: Plums are juicy fruits with smooth skin and a sweet-tart taste. They are eaten fresh, dried as prunes, or used in cooking.

name: Raspberry
description: Raspberries are small, red fruits with a delicate, sweet-tart flavor. They are commonly used in desserts, jams, and health foods.

name: Rose apple
description: Rose apples are bell-shaped tropical fruits with a crisp texture and subtle floral taste. They are often eaten fresh.

name: Strawberry
description: Strawberries are sweet, red berries with a juicy texture and fragrant aroma. They are popular in desserts, salads, and preserves.

name: Watermelon
description: Watermelons are large fruits with juicy, sweet, red or pink flesh. They are perfect for hydration and enjoyed fresh during summer.
